enabled.description: Whether CORS is enabled for this endpoint.

origins.description: The allowed origins. Use `*` to allow all origins. A wildcard can also be used in the subdomain, i.e. `https://*.example.com` will allow all origins on all subdomains of `example.com`.

enabled.description: Whether CORS is enabled for this endpoint.

origins.description: The allowed origins. Use `*` to allow all origins. A wildcard can also be used in the subdomain, i.e. `https://*.example.com` will allow all origins on all subdomains of `example.com`.

environment.description:
The environment of the project.
prod Production
stage Staging
dev Development
environment.x-go-enum-desc:
prod Production
stage Staging
dev Development

home_region.description:
The project home region.

This is used to set where the project data is stored and where the project's endpoints are located.
eu-central EUCentral
asia-northeast AsiaNorthEast
us-east USEast
us-west USWest
eu EU
asia Asia
us US
global Global
home_region.x-go-enum-desc:
eu-central EUCentral
asia-northeast AsiaNorthEast
us-east USEast
us-west USWest
eu EU
asia Asia
us US
global Global

organizations.description:
The organizations of the project.

Organizations are used to group users and enforce certain restrictions like usage of SSO.

default_region.description:
DefaultRegion sets the default region for identities provisioned into
this organization, when the identity does not specify a region explictly.
eu-central EUCentral
asia-northeast AsiaNorthEast
us-east USEast
us-west USWest
eu EU
asia Asia
us US
global Global
default_region.x-go-enum-desc:
eu-central EUCentral
asia-northeast AsiaNorthEast
us-east USEast
us-west USWest
eu EU
asia Asia
us US
global Global

state.description:
The state of the project.
running Running
halted Halted
deleted Deleted
state.x-go-enum-desc:
running Running
halted Halted
deleted Deleted

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).

schema.title: JSON API Error Response
